name: Vinythai Public Company Limited
summary: Vinythai Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes polyvinyl chloride (PVC) and vinyl chloride monomer in Thailand, India, South Korea, Vietnam, China, Malaysia, Taiwan, Bangladesh, Indonesia, the United States, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Vinyl and Biochemical. The company provides PVC resins, such as suspension and paste PVC resins under the Siamvic name for automotive, building and construction, electrical and electronics, consumer goods, packaging, and healthcare industries; caustic soda; hydrogen and sodium hypochlorite; and bio-based Epichlorohydrin for automotive, aerospace, and wind turbine industries. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Rayong, Thailand. Vinythai Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of AGC Inc.
